Negotiable Technology Licensing
NLR's licensing opportunities, managed by its Technology Transfer Office, are available
    to businesses with the technical and financial resources to turn early-stage technology
    into commercial products.
Featured Technologies
Pulse Width Modulation-Gate Driver Power Control System
Smart-Grid Network Visualization, Intrusion Detection, and Network Healing
Nitriles for Carbon Fiber
Spin Filters for Circularly Polarized Light
Interested in licensing NLR technologies?
Visit the
Lab Partnering Service
and the
Visual Intellectual Property Search
.
335+
Licenses
Since 2000, NLR has executed more than 335 royalty-bearing license and option agreements.
Patents
NLR has more than 920 patented or patent-pending technologies available for licensing.
Software
NLR has more than 250 copyrighted software tools available for licensing.
